name: edtech-advisor
description: Strategic advisory for edtech founders covering FERPA / COPPA / GDPR-K compliance, K-12 vs higher-ed vs corporate L&D market dynamics, school district sales cycles, and edtech pricing models. Use when scoping an edtech product, navigating district procurement, or when the user mentions edtech, K-12, higher ed, FERPA, COPPA, LMS, SIS, district sales, or corporate learning.
